goal: AI weekly recap generation wired and stored, all remaining pages built (Home, Team pages, Rivalries, Archive), site deployed publicly on Vercel.
summary: Phase 4 complete. All 7 steps delivered: week-brief assembler (pure transformer, JSON-serializable, 14 assertions pass), Claude API recap generation (commissioner voice, persona injection, immutable DB storage, /api/generate-recap cron endpoint), updated Home page (AI recap + scoreboard + awards + nav), Archive page (read-only recap list), Team pages (6 ISR-prebuilt routes with all engine stats + H2H), Rivalries page (full previous_league_id chain H2H grid, boundary note), and final polish (metadata, mobile nav, SVG favicon, teams index, DEPLOY.md). npm run build exits 0, npx tsc --noEmit clean throughout.
stepSummaries:
1. Build week-brief assembler (lib/recap/week-brief.ts): collects scores, matchup results, bench tax leader + swap, trades/waivers, standings deltas into compact typed JSON — no raw API dumps. [verified]
  2. Wire Claude API (Anthropic SDK) recap generation (lib/recap/generate.ts): system prompt with commissioner voice, persona injection from lib/managers.ts, 150–300 word constraint, stores output immutably to ai_recaps table keyed by season+week. [verified]
  3. Build Home / This Week page (/): current week scores, weekly awards cards, latest AI recap displayed. [verified]
  4. Build Archive page (/archive): browsable list of past AI recaps by week; renders stored text, never regenerates. [verified]
  5. Build Team pages (/team/[username]): roster, all personal stats (bench tax, draft grade, trade grade, waiver ROI), H2H record vs. each manager; Liz rendered by username. [verified]
  6. Build Rivalries page (/rivalries): H2H grid across all managers, all-time W/L pulled from full previous_league_id chain, annotated with Sleeper-data boundary note. [verified]
  7. Final polish pass: responsive layout QA, emoji/icon trophy aesthetic, favicon, meta tags, public Vercel deploy with env vars (SUPABASE_URL, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) configured. [verified]
